creator: estro@hejmo.ca
text:
https://www.bubblesoftapps.com/bubbleupnpserver2/

BubbleUPnP Server is not an UPnP/DLNA media server: it does not index your media.

It is a top layer for an actual UPnP/DLNA server that allows to connect from the internet and stream media on LTE newtork so one can access it's library outside home.  The AUTH is done over https.

My actual UPnP/DLNA media server is running on TrueNAS server but the Bubble is still on the desktop PC.  It would me sense to run on the NAS as well.
